---
title: "Renaud B. Evina"
image: renaud.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round    # This is the line that makes it round!
  image-width: 12em
---

### Professional Profile 
I am a consultant and researcher with years of experience in the intersection of [**Law**]{.text-primary}, [**Economics**]{.text-primary}, and [**Policy**]{.text-primary}. 

My work focuses on applying advanced quantitative methods to problems in [**public policy & management**]{.text-warning} at the regional and national levels.

### Education 

**University of Brasília** | Brasília, Brazil 

- MSc in Political Science | Mar 2018 - Dec 2020
- Bachelor of Laws      | 2011 - 2017
- Bachelor in Economics | 2005 - 2010

### Technical Expertise

I bridge the gap between theory and applied policy applying:

* [**Spatial Econometrics**]{.text-warning}
* [**Stochastic Frontier Models**]{.text-warning} (Benchmarking Analysis)
* [**Discrete Choice Experiments**]{.text-warning}

I use Software [**R**]{.text-primary} & [**PostgreSQL/PostGIS**]{.text-primary}
